discarded_claims.claim: Zapier is an AI orchestration platform.
discarded_claims.discard_reason: Claim is broad positioning without a task-specific benchmark method.

discarded_claims.claim: Make is a user friendly no-code integration tool.
discarded_claims.discard_reason: Ease-of-use claim is marketing language without a task method, audience or evidence threshold.

discarded_claims.claim: Scale and orchestrate your AI automations.
discarded_claims.discard_reason: Platform-scale promise does not prove any individual task outcome.

discarded_claims.claim: Breeze supports users by completing tasks throughout HubSpot.
discarded_claims.discard_reason: Breadth statement is useful context, but it does not prove how a specific task behaves.

discarded_claims.claim: Agentforce is the most complete enterprise agentic platform.
discarded_claims.discard_reason: Superlative vendor comparison without independent task method is not valid evidence.

discarded_claims.claim: Airtable AI examples imply universal preview and approval quality.
discarded_claims.discard_reason: Example automations do not demonstrate platform-wide trust behavior for every task.
